# sugarspunrun_best_cheesecake fixture status

This fixture is currently a **stub fixture**, not a true live-page capture.

Reason: in this execution environment, direct fetch to
`https://sugarspunrun.com/best-cheesecake-recipe/` failed due proxy tunnel restrictions (`403 Forbidden`).

What this means:
- `page.html` is a representative saved HTML sample used to exercise parser/pipeline regression tests.
- `parser_expected.json` and `final_expected.json` were generated by running the real parser pipeline against that saved HTML.

When network access is available, regenerate this fixture from the live URL with:

```bash
python scripts/build_good_fixture_from_url.py \
  --url "https://sugarspunrun.com/best-cheesecake-recipe/" \
  --fixture-name "sugarspunrun_best_cheesecake"
```
